name: ACP Progress Bridge
description: Relay ACP child-session progress and completion into internal parent-session updates. Default scope is Codex ACP children reporting back to Feishu group or main parent sessions.

enabled.description: Enable ACP child-session polling and parent-session bridge delivery.

parentSessionPrefixes.description: Parent session-key prefixes that may receive internal [[acp_bridge_update]] messages. Defaults cover Feishu group sessions and local main sessions.

childSessionPrefixes.description: ACP child-session prefixes to watch. Default is Codex-first; add other providers only if they emit compatible ACP progress/done events.

pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval for session-store and ACP stream discovery.

firstProgressDelayMs.description: Minimum delay before the first progress relay after a child run is discovered.

progressDebounceMs.description: Minimum spacing between subsequent progress relays for the same child run.

maxProgressUpdatesPerRun.description: Maximum number of progress relays sent for one child run.

settleAfterDoneMs.description: Delay after a done event before final completion delivery, giving transcript/assistant tail time to settle.

replayCompletedWithinMs.description: Recent completion replay window. Older finished runs discovered late are marked handled instead of replayed.

finalAssistantTailChars.description: Maximum assistant tail characters attached to completion bridge updates.

deliverProgress.description: Whether progress bridge updates should be delivered back through the parent session. Disabled by default to avoid noisy parent-session chatter; enable only when you explicitly want in-chat progress relays.

deliverCompletion.description: Whether completion bridge updates should be delivered back through the parent session.
